data.title: SEC's Focus on Tokenization Boosts Financial Privacy Regulations
data.description:
SEC Commissioner Hester Peirce highlights tokenization and privacy at a recent summit, emphasizing the agency’s regulatory agenda and the need for updated financial privacy protections.

data.title: OKX will launch ASTER spot trading
data.description: According to official news, OKX will launch ASTER spot trading. The specific schedule is as follows: ASTER deposit opening time: October 17, 2025, 10:00 am (UTC+8); ASTER advance order period: October 17, 2025, 1:00 to 2:00 pm (UTC+8); ASTER/USDT spot trading opening time: October 17, 2025, 2:00 pm (UTC+8).

data.title: Ripple Labs leads $1 billion raise for new XRP treasury: Bloomberg
data.description:
Ripple announced earlier on Thursday that it acquired GTreasury, a Chicago-based treasury management system software and solutions firm.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/375043/ripple-labs-1-billion-raise-xrp-treasury?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: VanEck Submits Application for Lido Staked Ethereum ETF
data.description: According to PANews, VanEck has filed an S-1 application for its Lido Staked Ethereum ETF, as reported by Cointelegraph. This move marks a significant step in the company's efforts to expand its offerings in the cryptocurrency investment space. The application submission indicates VanEck's intention to provide investors with access to Ethereum staking through a regulated exchange-traded fund. The ETF aims to offer a new avenue for investors to engage with Ethereum's staking mechanism, potentially increasing the accessibility and appeal of Ethereum investments.

data.title: A revolving loan long AAVE whale sold 70,000 AAVE today to pay off all loans and reduce leverage.
data.description: According to on-chain data analyst Ember, a long AAVE whale, who had previously been nearly liquidated when AAVE fell below $120 in April, sold 70,000 AAVE (worth approximately $15.62 million) today to repay all his debts and reduce his leverage. Over the past four hours, he withdrew 70,000 AAVE from Aave and sold them at an average price of $223 for 15.62 million USDC, paying off his Aave debt. After repaying his debts, he only held 21,000 AAVE (worth approximately $4.8 million).

data.title: Base app: Creator tokens will be launched and are currently in early access.
data.description: The Base app announced the launch of creator tokens on the X platform, currently in early access. These tokens will allow creators to: create and earn revenue globally; build lasting value from their content, benefiting from long-term growth and active transactions; and give back to their audiences. This feature is powered by Zora and implemented within the Base app.

data.title: JPMorgan says crypto market crash was driven by native traders

source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/jpmorgan-says-native-traders-drove-crash/

data.title: Planet Morning News
data.description: 1. Bloomberg: Ripple Labs plans to lead a $1 billion investment to build an XRP reserve strategy; 2. Spot gold briefly hit $4,380 per ounce; 3. Florida legislation proposes allowing state government funds and pension funds to allocate to Bitcoin and related ETFs; 4. Tether faces a $44.7 million stablecoin freeze lawsuit, with the plaintiff claiming the illegal freeze resulted in a significant investment opportunity lost; 5. A major investor opened a $100 million ETH short position with 25x leverage, currently sitting on a $638,000 unrealized profit; 6. Charles Schwab plans to launch spot Bitcoin and cryptocurrency trading services in 2026; 7. Traders are fully pricing in two more Federal Reserve interest rate cuts before the end of 2025.

data.title: DL Holdings announced a strategic partnership with Antalpha to acquire and distribute $100 million worth of XAUT and invest another $100 million in Bitcoin mining equipment.
data.description: DL Holdings Group Limited (HKEX: 1709) today announced a comprehensive strategic partnership with Antalpha, a company valued at up to US$200 million. This collaboration encompasses tokenized gold assets and Bitcoin mining infrastructure. Regarding gold assets, DL Holdings has made an initial US$5 million investment in Tether Gold (XAUT) and plans to acquire and distribute up to US$100 million worth of XAUT over the next twelve months. Regarding computing power infrastructure, the Group has planned an additional US$100 million investment in Bitcoin mining equipment, having already purchased thousands of high-performance mining machines and established a strategic alliance with Antalpha. This partnership will strengthen DL Holdings' upstream computing power capabilities and help it become a leading listed Bitcoin mining company in Asia. (Business Insider)

data.title: Bloomberg: Ripple Labs plans to lead $1 billion investment to build XRP reserve strategy
data.description: Ripple Labs is leading a fundraising effort to raise at least $1 billion through a special purpose acquisition company (the name of which has not yet been disclosed) to accumulate its associated digital token, XRP. The funds will be invested in a newly established digital asset reserve, with Ripple Labs also contributing some of its own XRP. (Bloomberg)

PAXG, which was initially held at an average price of $3,828.93 three weeks ago and deposited to Binance two hours ago at $4,426.52, would have generated a profit of $597,000 if sold. data.title: AAVE Whale Liquidates Holdings to Settle Debt
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, a prominent AAVE investor, who narrowly avoided liquidation in April when AAVE prices fell below $120, has sold 70,000 AAVE tokens valued at approximately $15.62 million. This move was made to repay all outstanding loans and remove leverage.

Over the past four hours, the investor retrieved 70,000 AAVE from Aave and sold them at an average price of $223, converting the proceeds into 15.62 million USDC to clear the debt on Aave. Following the repayment, the investor retains 21,000 AAVE tokens, worth around $4.8 million.

data.title: Citigroup dumps its pesos to Fed as Scott Bessent ramps up $20B Argentina rescue
data.description:
Citigroup sold a massive batch of Argentine pesos to the Federal Reserve on Thursday, a decision tied to US Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent’s sweeping plan to steady Argentina’s collapsing currency and keep President Javier Milei’s administration from spinning out ahead of next week’s midterm vote. The transaction reportedly happened quietly with the Fed acting as […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/citigroup-dumps-its-pesos-to-fed/

data.title: Market Sentiment Turns Bearish as Funding Rates Decline
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, recent data from Coinglass indicates a growing bearish sentiment in the cryptocurrency market. Following a further decline last night, the number of trading pairs with negative funding rates has increased compared to the previous day.

Funding rates are fees set by cryptocurrency trading platforms to maintain balance between contract prices and the prices of underlying assets, typically applied to perpetual contracts. This mechanism facilitates the exchange of funds between long and short traders, without the platform charging a fee, to adjust the cost or yield of holding contracts, ensuring contract prices remain close to asset prices.

A funding rate of 0.01% is considered the benchmark rate. Rates above 0.01% suggest a bullish market sentiment, while rates below 0.005% indicate a bearish outlook.

data.title: Two whale/institutional addresses transferred over 170,000 ASTER to the exchange today, equivalent to approximately $22.88 million.
data.description:
According to on-chain analyst Yu Jin, two major whale/institutional addresses transferred 17.857 million ASTER (worth $22.88 million) to exchanges today.

One of these whale/institutional addresses, which has accumulated 64.535 million ASTER through Gate, has been transferring tokens to Binance for several consecutive days. Today, this address transferred another 9.575 million ASTER (approximately $12.53 million) to Binance. According to on-chain data, this address has transferred a total of 58.608 million ASTER (approximately $92.25 million) to Binance over the past week, leaving only approximately 5.926 million ASTER (approximately $7.42 million) remaining, and is expected to be fully transferred out soon. Another whale/institutional investor who participated in the WLFI public offering (subscribing for 200 million WLFI with 10 million USDT) withdrew 8.282 million ASTER tokens from Bybit three weeks ago (then worth approximately $16.86 million at a price of $2.03). Approximately eight hours ago, these ASTER tokens were transferred back to Bybit. Due to the recent price drop, ASTER is currently trading at approximately $1.25, and the market value of the tokens held by this address has shrunk by approximately $6.52 million.
